svg.text: Laravel 12 Gateway · FastAPI BKT Microservice · Sanctum Auth · Base: /api/v1

g.text: Register a new user, initialize BKT matrix, return Sanctum token
Authenticate with email + password, return Sanctum token
Return authenticated user profile with BKT matrix
Home screen aggregate: active lesson, recent match, daily puzzles, coaching, stats
List all lessons with user progress. Filter: ?category=Opening
Single lesson with full chapter content + user progress
Update lesson progress. Body: { current_chapter_id, progress: 0.0–1.0 }
List all AI grandmaster personas for the GM Selection screen
Single grandmaster profile (name, style, strengths, openings)
Paginated match history with grandmaster details (20/page)
Start a new sparring match. Body: { grandmaster_id }
Finalize match with PGN, result, moves, duration, analysis. Owner-only
Trigger BKT analysis via FastAPI microservice. Owner-only
5 daily puzzles matched to user ELO, excluding today's attempts
Last 20 puzzle attempts with puzzle details
Record puzzle attempt. Body: { solved, time_seconds }. Updates streak
Current training plan with BKT matrix and weakest skills analysis
Regenerate training plan via FastAPI. Fallback if ML unavailable
Rating history, W/L/D stats, phase accuracy, insights, top opponents
Python 3.11 · Port 8000 · Internal only (called by Laravel)
Health check — confirms service is online
Bayesian posterior update from classified blunders → new BKT matrix
Generate personalized weekly training plan from BKT matrix + ELO
